body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.

**Phase context:** Psychedelic decoupling — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states of consciousness.

**Psychedelia: The interplay of music and psychedelics.** — Ann N Y Acad Sci (2024). DOI: 10.1111/nyas.15082. PMID: 37983198. Music and psychedelics have been intertwined throughout the existence of Homo sapiens, from the early shamanic rituals of the Americas and Africa to the modern use of psychedelic-assisted therapy for a variety of mental health conditions. Across such settings, music has been highly prized for its ability to guide the psychedelic experience.
